core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix B2B efficiency with D2C aesthetics.
Content is King: Data tables and grids must be scannable but beautiful.
Contrast: Use Deep Blue vs Bright Orange to guide attention.
Negative Space: Dense data needs breathing room. Use 'Comfortable' density by default.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1E3A8A] hover:bg-[#172554] text-white shadow-sm font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 shadow-sm font-medium
buttons.accent: bg-[#F97316] hover:bg-[#EA580C] text-white shadow-md font-bold uppercase tracking-wide text-xs

cards.base: bg-white rounded-lg border border-slate-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden
cards.interactive: bg-white rounded-lg border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:border-[#1E3A8A]/30 transition-all cursor-pointer group

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1E3A8A] focus:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.status_pending: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-yellow-200 bg-yellow-50 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-yellow-800
badges.status_approved: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-green-200 bg-green-50 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-green-800
badges.status_rejected: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-red-200 bg-red-50 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold text-red-800

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL_DEPENDENCIES: npm install lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge recharts react-day-picker date-fns cmdk @radix-ui/react-dialog @radix-ui/react-slot @radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu @radix-ui/react-label @radix-ui/react-select @radix-ui/react-avatar @radix-ui/react-separator @radix-ui/react-tabs @radix-ui/react-toast @radix-ui/react-tooltip

THEME_SETUP: Configure tailwind.config.js to use the specific colors defined in 'colors' section. Do not rely on default 'slate' or 'blue'. Explicitly define 'brand-blue': '#1E3A8A' and 'brand-orange': '#F97316'.

LAYOUT_RULE: Always use a sidebar layout for the dashboard. The sidebar should be '#1E3A8A' (Dark Blue) with white text to create a strong professional frame. The main content area should be 'bg-slate-50'.
CARD_CATALOG: Use the 'Masonry' or 'Grid' layout for cards. Display the Design Number prominently (e.g., 'B-104') as wholesalers rely on codes.
TABLE_DESIGN: Use a clean table design with NO vertical borders. Header should be uppercase and small (text-xs). Rows should have hover effects.
TESTING: Add data-testid to all inputs, buttons, and cards. Format: 'entity-action' (e.g., 'login-submit', 'card-item-123').
universal_guidelines: Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry for interest.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters for sticky headers.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Never use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
